headline: Is It Time To Reconsider CDW (CDW) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering whether CDW is starting to look like good value, or if the recent share price leaves little margin for error? This breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. CDW recently closed at US$122.01, with returns of 3.2% over the last week, a 1.9% decline over the last 30 days, and year to date and 1 year returns of 8.4% and 14.1% declines, alongside 3 year and 5 year returns of 31.5% and 26.0% declines. These moves have come while investors weigh ongoing news around technology...
